seo.title: Residential Solutions
seo.description: A cooler, healthier and more comfortable home for the people who matter most. IrisPro window films are engineered for ASEAN climates to reduce heat, block harmful UV & HEV Blue Light, protect your interiors and help you save on electricity bills.

data.subhead: A cooler, healthier and more comfortable home for the people who matter most. IrisPro window films are engineered for ASEAN climates to reduce heat, block harmful UV & HEV Blue Light, protect your interiors and help you save on electricity bills.

media.alt: Bright living room by floor-to-ceiling windows, comfortable in daylight with IrisPro film

cards.title: Excessive Heat
cards.description: Sunlight heats up your home, making it uncomfortable.

cards.title: Harmful UV & HEV Blue Light
cards.description: Daily exposure affects your skin, eyes and overall well-being.

cards.title: Interior Fading
cards.description: Furniture, flooring, curtains and artwork fade faster under UV exposure.

cards.title: High Energy Bills
cards.description: More heat entering your home means higher air-conditioning usage.

cards.title: Indoor Comfort
cards.description: Reduce glare and hot spots for a more pleasant living space.

cards.title: Family & Kids Protection
cards.description: Keep your loved ones safe from harmful UV & HEV exposure.

data.hint: Click on the option above to get a recommended IrisPro solution that fits your needs.

stats.label: of heat enters through windows & glass doors
stats.footnote: Source: Lawrence Berkeley National Laboratory (LBNL). Windows are the biggest contributor to indoor heat gain.

pillars.title: UV+420™ Optical Technology
pillars.description: Blocks UVA, UVB & HEV Blue Light (380–420nm) for complete protection.

pillars.title: 6-Layer Hotmelt™ Technology
pillars.description: Patented 6-layer structure for superior durability and long-term performance.

pillars.title: Multi-layer Sputtering
pillars.description: Reflects up to 98% of solar heat (1400nm) for maximum heat rejection.

pillars.title: Professional Installation
pillars.description: Expert installation for maximum performance and warranty support.

_unplaced.note: Copy from the canonical screen with no expressible section field. Preserved for the client / a future section type.
_unplaced.how-irispro-solves-intro: IrisPro advanced window films block heat, UV & HEV at the source, keeping your home cooler, protecting your interior and reducing energy consumption.
_unplaced.why-homeowners-footnote: *Results may vary based on film type, window size, orientation, building design and usage.
_unplaced.hero-standfirst-note: The hero shows two paragraphs ('A cooler, healthier…' as a standfirst, then the longer paragraph); the schema has a single subhead string, so they are joined with a space.

_alternates.note: Second residential screen ('Comfort Living. Better Protection. Smarter Choice.'). NOT rendered — see _conflicts.md §16. Client must rule which variant is canonical.

hero.subhead: IrisPro residential window films are engineered for ASEAN climate to keep your home cooler, protect your family, reduce energy bills and preserve the beauty of your interiors.
hero-stat-overlay: Blocks up to 98% Total Solar Energy

cert-chip-row: SIRIM Certified Grade A1 (_verify — may read 'Grade A')

benefits.heading: The Benefits of Residential Window Films

cards.title: Comfort Living
cards.description: Reduces heat and glare, maintains a cooler indoor environment all day long.

cards.title: Protect Your Family
cards.description: Blocks harmful UV+420, protects skin and eyes, especially for children and the elderly.

cards.title: Protect Interiors
cards.description: Prevents fading, cracking and discoloration of furniture, curtains, flooring and artwork.

cards.title: Save Energy & Lower Bills
cards.description: Less heat means less air-conditioning usage and lower electricity bills.

cards.title: Enhance Home Value
cards.description: Improves overall comfort, aesthetics and long-term property value.

why-uv420-matters.heading: Why UV+420™ Matters at Home
why-uv420-matters.body: UV+420™ blocks not only UVA/UVB but also harmful Blue Light (HEV) that penetrates deeper into skin and eyes.

annotations.title: High Heat Rejection
annotations.description: Rejects up to 98% of total solar energy

annotations.title: Interior Protection
annotations.description: Keeps your home cooler and interiors last longer

energy-saving-impact.heading: Energy Saving Impact
energy-saving-impact.body: Reduce your home's cooling load and contribute to a greener environment.
energy-saving-impact.footnote: Results may vary based on film type, glass type and environment.

testimonials.heading: What Our Customers Say
testimonials.quote: The house is so much cooler now and our electricity bill dropped. Curtains and furniture no longer fade. Highly recommended!
testimonials.author: Ms. Elaine Tan
